title: Jinbe Inherits the Pain
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is jinbe inherits the pain.
scene: The scene follows jinbe inherits the pain, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And then, one day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: An invitation ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kill!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...to the Royal Shichibukai ....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, your bounty has reached two hundred and fifty million bell....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This means they're starting to realised just how big a threat you could pose to the government in the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they're starting to take us seriously, eh? ...Let's send them a flat refusal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and send your infamy soaring right up into the skies, Captain jimbe!! Chu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No... I think I might ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Accept their offer ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ehh ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is good to see you again, jimbel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If I join the Shichibukai ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then the government will grant us a pardon ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aladin, and all the others who have no desire to live a life of piracy, to return here and live their lives in peace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is more, if I accept this position...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....Perhaps I can help our people to grow a little closer to the world government.

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: If I can do anything to make up for the trouble we have caused her majesty ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We would be most grateful. The queen has been in low spirits lately...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I believe that this is what the late tiger would have wanted.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However... there is one thing that bothers me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: about the granting of this pardon...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Arlong, member of the Sun Pirates, is released...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So, old brother jimbel....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I hear you're becoming a shichi- Bukai!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lowering yourself to serving ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...the Filthy Human Government !!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Have you forgotten the words of our brother til, Arlong?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It is wrong to live a life of hatred!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You've gone soft, brother.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I joined you again, I'm sure I could be safe as anything, but I ain't gonna do that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Our big bro is dead!! So I'm going back to my old crew - the ARLONG Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I'm taking my old comrades with me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is farewell ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really want to stop me ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is YOUR LAST CHANCE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kill me where I stand!!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: A... Arlong- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you can't do it, then I walk free.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Someone remember

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the wrath of the fish-man race!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't talk such non-sense!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ung HH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jimbel- San!! Stop this, please !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no need to trouble yourself over him, jimbel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are brothers in arms, born and raised together in the fish-man district!! No matter the reason...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nobody could expect you to take his life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that fool... why does he not understand our brother til's true wishes ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter where he chooses to go... if he causes trouble, the Marines will move against him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and if they do not, then we will find him and stop him ourselves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ..........and the government between

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: With jimbei's instatement into the Shichibukal, and Arlong's return from captivity...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: The sun pirates split into three groups, each following a different path...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're gonna do as we like, just like the old days, Captain Jimbe!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ughhh...!! Damn that bastard and his hereculean strength ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: *Cough*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hurry up, Hach!!

summary: Jinbe Inherits the Pain. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
